title: Glove Word Embeddings (3 year)
content:
# Glove Word Embeddings (3 year)

Authors: Pair, Emma
Published: 2021-12-08T02:06:39Z
Subjects: Computer and Information Science, Social Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/XQ9685

These are GloVe word embeddings created from article text grouped into three years (e.g. 1998-2000, 2001-2003) from the Daily Nation, a Kenyan newspaper, and the corresponding vocabulary files.

Citation: Pair, Emma, 2021, "Glove Word Embeddings (3 year)", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/XQ9685, Harvard Dataverse, V1
